title: BlockChain Currency
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vj4l60WX/images/f2c3e85d81d1eaaf044978a01061c05717ed6cc0.png)

## Installation Requirements
| Minecraft | Forge | NeoForge | Fabric | Quilt |
|--|--|--|--|--|
| 1.20.1 | Yes | Yes | No | No |

**THIS MOD IS IN EARLY DEVELOPMENT! THERE ARE BOUND TO BE SOME THINGS THAT ARE BROKEN, MISSING, AND MORE! PLEASE LEAVE FEEDBACK AND ISSUES ON THE [GITHUB](https://github.com/GamingEinstein/BlockChainCurrency)!**

## About
BlockChain Currency is a brand new, highly advanced, well-developed (all lies... probably) currency system designed for economy-based servers! Using the latest and greatest Block3 technologies, we hope to help alleviate the headache of deciding on what whether your SMP wants to use Diamonds or Sticks as a trading medium. Introducing BITS, the latest and greatest in coinage! The value is determined by what the server wants, so if you want it to be worthless or a commodity, you can! Surely your Bits will go to the End, right? Start making Bits using the Bits Fabricator, which takes Diamonds as input currently, but is planned to be changeable later on!

As always, installing [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or equivalents will be the best way to view the items and recipes this mod offers


<details>
<summary>A little notice</summary>

This is my first official mod, so there will probably be some things that I can't fix by myself as I lack a lot of modding knowledge. Feel free to leave suggestions and bug reports on the [GitHub](https://github.com/GamingEinstein/BlockChainCurrency/issues), though!

</details>



## FAQ

<details>
<summary>Open FAQ</summary>

Q: Why release now??
A: Because I want feedback and testing from other people. That, and... because I felt like it

Q: cAn YoU aDd SuPpOrT fOr VeRsIoN (insert version here)
A: Currently, there are no plans to downgrade to any lower versions, nor is there plans to update to later versions (at least until NeoForge is more feature ready)

Q: WhAt AbOuT fAbRiC/qUiLt???
A: That would require me to learn another mod loader, which isn't feasible right now. That doesn't mean there aren't plans in the future, though...

Q: Why is this a question?
A: Because I want it here

</details>



## Development
If you are interesting in helping develop, feel free to contact me on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/em3VYuF6), or leave something on the issue tracker
